title: Stellar 3D
description:
A pack that makes things (within reason) 3D, stellarly!

3D doors, 3D trapdoors, 3D ladders, 3D rails, 3D brewing stand, 3D iron bars, 3D mushrooms, 3D mushrooms, and more!

It also gives doors proper hinges and sides!
body:
![The Stellar Tweaks creeper with a pride flag background with the text "Happy Pride!"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/643e4c80fd2aaf15eecbbcacef4eb1628ad38d24.png)
## Stellar 3D is a [fully customizable](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) resource pack dedicated to making 2D things _(that won't lower your framerate down to 5 FPS)_ into 3D, adding depth where there was previously none!
Please keep in mind that this pack **does** periodically receive updates with new fixes, tweaks, and content.

#
![Now... The Goods:](https://i.postimg.cc/6QpJrw1v/Now-The-Goods-S3D.png)

This pack even *fixes a few vanilla bugs*, notably trapdoor rotations being... questionable at best. As well as door textures not having unique sides and the hinges not making any semblance of sense, and the mirrored shading on double doors, and the z-fighting that can happen on the bottom of iron bars.

<details><summary>Click to see list of features</summary>

- 3D Rails
- 3D Doors
- 3D Trapdoors
- Fixed door rotation
- Fixed trapdoor rotation
- Fixed door shading
- Fixed door hinges
- 3D red and brown mushrooms
- 3D crimson and warped fungus
- 3D iron bars
- 3D ladders
- 3D lily pads
- 3D sugar cane
- 3D bamboo fence
- Variated sugar cane 
- Better iron door texture
- Better spruce door texture
   </details>
<details><summary>Click to see list of supported mods</summary>

- [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra)

Want more? Ask!
   </details>

### Reminder that almost everything can be toggled on/off with the help of [respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)!
#

Everything **should** work from 26.1.x-1.17 <u>_(Ignore version warnings)_</u>, however, the only supported versions are 1.19+, anything before that was only briefly tested. Most changes, especially the basic ones, will work even pre-1.17.
Yes, even the doors work in previous versions, it overrides the blockstates file.

*Want to talk? Check out our Discord! You can also check out the Trello for a list of what's planned!*
[![Discord](https://i.postimg.cc/Bt9MMcSt/Discord.png)](https://discord.gg/hQqx2mqMz8) [![Trello](https://i.postimg.cc/4nkBBbft/Trello.png)](https://trello.com/b/qqx0Nr14/minecraft-stellar-tweaks)
#

# <u>Q & A</u>

<details><summary><X> is broken with Complementary Reimagined (/Other shaders)! </summary>

Sadly it's basically impossible for resource packs to properly support shaders in a lot of ways, but the following can be changed to fix problems (assuming you are using Integrated PBR):

Unzip the shader and remove the offending block from `shaders/block.properties`(file can be opened with any text editor, Notepad works) by doing `Ctrl + F` and just deleting any mention of it you find
 *(Recommended for sugar_cane, it looks a lot prettier!).*

</details>

<details><summary>Can you add make <X> 3D? </summary>

Don't know, join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/hQqx2mqMz8) and ask! 
</details>

<details><summary>How do I know what's being worked on?</summary>

We have a Trello we use to keep track of everything being added, and it contains the upcoming changelog(s), you can find it [here](https://trello.com/b/qqx0Nr14/minecraft-stellar-tweaks)!
</details>

<details><summary>I like this one feature but not everything else, can you make that a separate pack? </summary>

As of now, you can use [respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) to turn every single feature of Stellar 3D on/off!

</details>

<details><summary>Make grass and flowers and vines 3D or your pack sucks</summary>

Errr... do you *like* having 5 FPS? Do you play Minecraft as a slideshow rather than a game?
</details>

<details><summary>Your entire pack sucks and isn't even remotely vanilla styled, you liar. Vanilla isn't 3D.</summary>

*Looks at the anvil, grindstone, bell, lectern, hanging signs, composter, lanterns, sculk shrieker, shelves, copper golem statue, hopper, fences, bars, and beacon*

Err... you sure about that?
</details>

<details><summary>Respackopts crashes my game/doesn't work! </summary>

  [respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) is compatible with Fabric and NeoForge, but not Quilt. Can't use Quilt. or Liteloader. But why would you be using that??

In addition, respackopts (and several other mods this pack optionally uses) are **COMPLETELY INCOMPATIBLE** with clients such as Feather (Now Dawn.gg), you shouldn't be using these clients anyway as they are often incredibly shady and break a ton of things, but completely break when used with respackopts.

</details>

# ARR License Exceptions

<details><summary>License Exceptions</summary>

- If you're here to see if you can use it in YT videos and the like and such, the answer is yes. Ideally pop a link in the description but that's not 100% required.

- You may add this resource pack to modpacks, but it must NOT be modified and ideally credit is directly and clearly given in the description in the form of a link to the [source](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stellar-3d) on Modrinth. (Required if not able to link in dependencies, such as not hosted on Modrinth)

*unless said modifications are directly approved by us, which may be asked for on the [Discord](https://discord.gg/hQqx2mqMz8).

*You can always just make a custom pack and override features via load order, in most cases there is no need to modify our pack unless you are editing sprite assets in which case yes you must ask for approval.

- If you're using our pack in a video please add a link to it in the description if possible.

- You may NOT smell the textures.

- We reserve the right to revoke any priveleges given for any reason.

*Everything we have written here precedes any exceptions given inside any version of the pack itself*

*Any exceptions not written here but included inside the pack itself should be considered not applicable, now null and void.*

</details>

#
[![Just look at the gallery already. Please. I beg of you.](https://i.postimg.cc/9Qyv50s3/Gallery.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stellar-3d/gallery)

[![Also try Stellar Tweaks!](https://i.postimg.cc/d1VXyB3Z/Also-Try-Stellar-Tweaks-2.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stellar-tweaks)
#

The shader used in some screenshots is [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) using [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) in [Minecraft Java Edition](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us)
